# Data — Processed

Cleaned and preprocessed dataset ready for model training.

## Contents

This directory contains images after applying:

- Resizing to target dimensions
- Normalization (ImageNet / min-max / standard)
- Stain normalization (if enabled)
- Train / validation / test splits
